subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thou art the All-Merciful, Thou art the Most Compassionate. Have mercy upon Thy servant who hath taken refuge at the gate of Thy oneness, who seeketh shelter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت الرحمن انت الرحیم ارحم عبدک الملتجی الی باب احدیتک اللائذ
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
